steps.title: Introduce author and novel
steps.content: The goal is to introduce Marcus Baptiste and The Lonely Londoners to a new audience. A strong introductory sentence should identify Baptiste, name the novel, and explain what the novel is about.

steps.title: Reject partial introductions
steps.content:
• Choice B focuses on Moses Ascending, not on introducing The Lonely Londoners.
  • Choice C describes the novel but does not name Marcus Baptiste.
  • Choice D gives a character-overlap detail rather than introducing the author and novel.
The remaining choice identifies Baptiste as a Trinidadian author, names the novel, gives the year, and summarizes its subject. The answer is A.
